name: Spinach Ala Marianne
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the spinach and place it in a covered saucepan with water still clinging to the leaves.
2. Heat some water and refresh the dried tomatoes by cutting them into slivers.
3. In a small frying pan, heat the olive oil (from marinated tomatoes). Peel several cloves of garlic and slice them into 2 or 3 pieces. Coarsely chop the slightly crushed garlic. Add the garlic to the hot oil and brown it. Remove from heat.
4. Cook the spinach until just wilted if it is fresh and young, or cook it a bit longer if it is older.
5. Pour the oil and garlic over the spinach. Sprinkle the tomatoes over it and add a small amount of salt and pepper. Toss the spinach to mix.
Difficulty: easy
Precision: measure ingredients
